sections.text: Section 180 imposes a duty of care and diligence on directors and officers. Directors must exercise their powers with the degree of care and diligence that a reasonable person would exercise.
Section 181 requires directors and officers to act in good faith in the best interests of the corporation and for a proper purpose.
The supplier indemnifies the customer against direct losses arising from intellectual property infringement claims, except to the extent caused by customer modifications.
Either party may terminate this agreement for material breach if the breach is not remedied within 30 days after written notice.

queries.query: What does section 180 require from directors?
Find the termination clause notice period.
expected_snippets: terminate this agreement for material breach

queries.query: Which clause covers indemnity for IP infringement?
